---
name: Architectural Feedback
about: Challenge, support, or extend an architectural position
title: "[Feedback] "
labels: architectural-feedback
---

## Which principle or section?

Identify the specific principle (1–10) or section this relates to.

## Your position

Do you agree, disagree, or want to extend the argument? Summarise your view.

## Evidence or reasoning

What supports your position? Implementation experience, research, industry examples, or logical arguments are all valuable.

## Suggested change (if any)

If you're proposing a specific change to the paper, describe it here.
